attributes.action: Dont change the number of miles you can do in a motability car
attributes.background: Ive had a motability cars for 10 years its the only form of independence I have the milage at the moment is 60000 miles over 3  years you are now reducing it to 30000 over 3 years this is disgusting what about having 2 or 3 hospital appointments a week

rejection.details: We already have a petition open on this, which you may wish to sign: https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/752400
